title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at Oberoi Realty

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Business Development Manager at Oberoi Realty
jsonLd.description:
Oberoi Realty has an exciting opening for a Business Development Manager at our Rajkot office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Oberoi Realty:
Oberoi Realty is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Negotiation Skills
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Contract Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oberoi Realty!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
